name: @seanhogg/builderforce-brain-ui
description: Shared React UI for the BuilderForce Brain — the <BrainTimeline> transcript (lineage/timeline dots, thinking steps, collapsible tool input/output, image bubbles), a <Markdown> renderer, and the <Project360View> whole-picture project health surface (two-ring sunburst, gaps, workforce). Presentational only; driven by the brain-embedded core / the /api/projects/:id/360 rollup, themed via CSS variables so the SAME components render identically on the web app and inside a VS Code webview.
author: Sean Hogg
